daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await

top_events.title: Spectrum | Onward and Upward
top_events.description: Second test flight of the Isar Spectrum launch vehicle, carrying 5 cubesats and 1 non-separable experiment for ESA's 'Boost!' program.

top_events.title: Kinetica 1 | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: Launch by CAS Space with unknown payload, showcasing China's solid-propellant capabilities.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-21
top_events.description: SpaceX's routine Starlink satellite deployment, part of the ongoing mega-constellation project.
